description: 幂等键(P1-6):写操作(claim/report)必须带 Idempotency-Key header,格式 <lang>-<uuid> 等价的每次独立键(非固定 report-{taskId})。请求侧断言:report 出向 header 含 Idempotency-Key 且匹配 <prefix>-<hex> 形态。各语言前缀不同(sdk-/go-/ts-/rs-/py-),正则放宽到非空前缀 + 连字符 + 十六进制串。

then.sdkExpectedAction: attach a per-call Idempotency-Key header of the form <lang>-<uuid>; never a fixed report-{taskId}
sdkMustNot: reuse a fixed idempotency key across distinct report calls
